sources.name: Lucide
sources.notes: Use icon names for action/nav/status role mapping. Names in the mapping are kebab-case identifiers.

sources.name: Heroicons
sources.notes: Useful for modern outline/solid role variants. Names in the mapping are kebab-case identifiers.

sources.name: Tabler Icons
sources.notes: Large icon set with consistent stroke-based style. Names in the mapping are kebab-case identifiers.

sources.name: Bootstrap Icons
sources.notes: Pack from Bootstrap project. Icons can be used independently of the Bootstrap CSS framework.

sources.name: Feather Icons
sources.notes: Minimal, stroke-based open source icon set. Good baseline for action icon role coverage.

sources.name: Material Symbols
sources.notes: Google Material icon set. Available in outlined, filled, rounded, and sharp variants. License requires attribution.

sources.name: Font Awesome Free
sources.notes: Free tier only. Pro icons require a license. Split license structure — verify per icon category before use.
